name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual payroll data entry causes cash flow gaps. We provide a payroll data conversion tool instead of manual entry into accounting software.
problem_solved: Manual payroll data entry leads to errors and delays in processing.
features: Export functionality to common accounting formats

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual payroll data entry leads to errors and delays in processing.

must_have_features: Export functionality to common accounting formats
